heading: DRUG-FREE COMMUNITIES
label: II DRUG-FREE COMMUNITIES
notes: CodificationThis subchapter is chapter 2 of subtitle A of title I of . [former ] repealed subtitle A effective . However, that repeal was not executed to this subchapter because of , (b), which not only designated subtitle A as chapter 1 of subtitle A, but also provided that any existing reference to subtitle A was to be deemed to be a reference to chapter 1 of subtitle A (see note set out under former ). Based on that provision, the repeal was executed in the Code only to subchapter I of this chapter, which comprises chapter 1 of subtitle A, and not to this subchapter, which comprises chapter 2. Nevertheless, , (2), , (set out as a note under ), directed the revival and restoration of chapter 2 (this subchapter), except for subchapter II thereof (part B of this subchapter), as in effect on , and as amended by and .Pub.
